instagram.content: Faith is built in the storm vs. Faith is built in the stillness - which has been true for you? When life gets turbulent, we often wonder if our trust is misplaced, yet the Bible says we are more steadfast than conquerors. Which perspective has you wrestled with in your journey of faith?
